\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{enumitem}

\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{3pt}
\setlength{\emergencystretch}{4em}
\raggedbottom

\setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=1.25em,itemsep=1pt,topsep=2pt,parsep=0pt,partopsep=0pt}
\setlist[enumerate]{leftmargin=1.35em,itemsep=1pt,topsep=2pt,parsep=0pt,partopsep=0pt}

\titleformat{\section}
  {\normalfont\bfseries\Large}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}

\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\normalfont\bfseries\normalsize\scshape}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}

\titleformat{\subsubsection}[runin]
  {\normalfont\bfseries\normalsize}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}
  [.]

\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{4pt}{5pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{5pt}{3pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{4pt}{0.5em}

\makeatletter
\renewcommand{\maketitle}{}
\makeatother
